description: A practical and stylish choice of bag from kiara with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this fashionable bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 26 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 15 cmMade of textured synthetic leather for durabilityPrint on the front  and back with metal buckle and synthetic strap detailTwo short handlesPrinted, adjustable and removable shoulder strapFour legs at the baseOne main zippered compartment with two zippered pockets and two pouches Two extendable sides with zippersCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
